title: Proxmox APT Egress Failure
summary: Student diagnoses why a Proxmox host or container cannot reach package repositories.
student_goal: Determine whether apt failure is caused by DNS, gateway, repository config, or outbound network access.

required_evidence.label: APT error output
required_evidence.description: Student must provide the relevant apt update error.

required_evidence.label: DNS test
required_evidence.description: Student must test name resolution from the affected system.

required_evidence.label: Gateway or internet reachability test
required_evidence.description: Student must test outbound network reachability.

opening_questions: What exact apt error are you seeing?
Can the system resolve repository hostnames?
Can the system reach its gateway or an external IP?
mentor_guidance_rules: Do not assume the repository list is wrong until DNS and routing are tested.
Ask for the exact apt error before suggesting fixes.
Separate DNS resolution failure from HTTP repository access failure.
